targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, type AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Distribuição atual por status
panels.description: Snapshot atual da tabela inteira, independente do time range do dashboard — fotografia do estado da fila agora.

targets.rawSql: SELECT status, count(*) AS total FROM tasks GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY extract(epoch from (completed_at - created_at)) * 1000) AS p50, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY extract(epoch from (completed_at - created_at)) * 1000) AS p95 FROM tasks WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND status = 'succeeded' AND completed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Taxa de falha por type (últimas 24h)
panels.description: Janela fixa de 24h, independente do time range do dashboard — proporção de tasks com status='failed' por tipo.

targets.rawSql: SELECT type, (count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed'))::float / NULLIF(count(*), 0) AS failure_rate FROM tasks WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY failure_rate DESC

panels.title: Distribuição de attempt (últimas 24h)
panels.description: Janela fixa de 24h, independente do time range do dashboard — quantas tasks foram tentadas N vezes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT attempt::text AS attempt_label, count(*) AS total FROM tasks WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY attempt ORDER BY attempt

panels.title: Top 10 erros por nome (últimas 24h, status=failed)
panels.description: Janela fixa de 24h, independente do time range do dashboard — visão consolidada de erros recentes para triagem rápida.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(error->>'name', 'unknown') AS error_name, count(*) AS total FROM tasks WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' AND status = 'failed' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10
